title: Duplicate "My Work"
excerpt:
Hi all, 
The “My Work” view is helpful, but is there a way to create multiple dashboards like it? This would allow me to have different default views for each category without having to adjust and customize fields every …

posts.author: vpatel1993 (Vaibhav Patel)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi all,

The “My Work” view is helpful, but is there a way to create multiple dashboards like it? This would allow me to have different default views for each category without having to adjust and customize fields every time.

Thank you!

posts.author: Fario_Consulting (Fario Consulting)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi Vaibhav,

Welcome the Monday community!

I would suggest that you have a “master board” design where all tasks from various job boards reside in one central task board.
Such an approach would allow you to have customizable fields and multiple default views tailored for each category without having to adjust settings every time
